hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git\s+add\s+(-A|\.|--all)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Never use git add -A, git add ., or git add --all. Stage specific files by path instead." >&2; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "mvn\s+(compile|test|verify|clean|package|install)(\s|$)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Never run mvn compile/test/verify — user handles these manually." >&2; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "skills\s+(add|install)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Never use \"skills add\" CLI — it creates symlinks and pollutes the repo with 20+ agent directories. Instead: 1) Download the SKILL.md from the source repo, 2) Copy to .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md (project) or ~/.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md (global)." >&2; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "\.java$"; then CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".content // .new_string // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "^import .+\.\*;"; then echo "BLOCKED: Wildcard imports are not allowed. Use specific imports instead." >&2; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "\.java$"; then CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".content // .new_string // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q "@Autowired"; then echo "WARNING: @Autowired detected. Use @RequiredArgsConstructor with private final fields for constructor injection."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(application-local\.yaml|docker-compose\.yaml)$"; then echo "WARNING: This file often has personal config (DB ports, credentials). Use backup-checkout-edit-restore pattern when committing — only stage the feature change, not personal config."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "db/migration/.*\.sql$"; then CONTENT=$(cat "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE "(SELECT|UPDATE|DELETE)\s" && ! echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qi "deleted"; then echo "WARNING: This migration has SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE but no \"deleted\" clause. Most tables use soft-delete — add AND deleted = false where appropriate."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "db/migration/.*\.sql$"; then BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE"); if ! echo "$BASENAME" | grep -qE "^V2_0_[0-9]{12}__[a-z0-9-]+\.sql$"; then echo "WARNING: Migration filename does not match convention V2_0_YYYYMMDDHHMI__description.sql. Got: $BASENAME"; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "/dto/.*\.java$"; then if grep -q "@Builder" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q "@NoArgsConstructor" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: DTO has @Builder but no @NoArgsConstructor. Jackson deserialization requires @NoArgsConstructor."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "service/impl/.*\.java$"; then if grep -qE "(PageRequest\.(of|ofSize)\(|Pageable\.ofSize\()" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: PageRequest.of()/ofSize() or Pageable.ofSize() found in service impl. Use PageRequestUtil.of() instead — it caps page size via setting.size.maxSizePerPage."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "Test\.java$"; then if grep -q "@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Use @MockitoSettings(strictness = Strictness.LENIENT) instead of @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class). @MockitoSettings already includes the extension."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "\.java$" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q "Test\.java$" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q "ApplicationUtil\.java$"; then if grep -qE "application\.(getLoan|getAsset|getCalculation|getSimulation)\(" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Direct application.getLoan()/getAsset()/getCalculation()/getSimulation() detected. Use ApplicationUtil.reflectedLoan(application), reflectedAsset(), reflectedCalculation(), reflectedSimulation() instead — returns amended data when present."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "/controller/.*\.java$"; then if awk "/^@FeatureFlag/{found=1} /^public class/{if(found){print \"WARNING: @FeatureFlag at class level is silently ignored — FeatureInterceptor only reads method-level annotations. Move to individual endpoints.\"; exit 0}} END{exit 1}" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then true; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "Test\.java$"; then if grep -qE "ErrorMessageConstant.*\.getMessage\(\)|\.getMessage\(\).*ErrorMessageConstant" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Test uses .getMessage() with ErrorMessageConstant on same line. Use .getErrorMessage() instead — getMessage() returns String, so Enum.equals(String) is always false (silent false-positive)."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "application\.yaml$" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q "application-local"; then CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".content // .new_string // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "feat[A-Z]"; then echo "REMINDER: New feature flag detected in application.yaml. Also register in application-local.yaml (set true for local dev)."; fi; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q "application-local\.yaml$"; then CONTENT=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".content // .new_string // empty" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE "feat[A-Z]"; then echo "REMINDER: New feature flag detected in application-local.yaml. Also register in application.yaml (default false)."; fi; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "service/impl/.*\.java$"; then if grep -q "BravoCommonResponse" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: BravoCommonResponse found in service impl. Services return raw DTOs — wrapping with BravoCommonResponse.success() belongs in controllers only."; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .filePath // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "/entity/.*\.java$"; then if grep -q "extends BaseEntity" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q "@SQLRestriction" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Entity extends BaseEntity but missing @SQLRestriction(\"deleted=false\"). Queries will return soft-deleted rows."; fi; fi; exit 0'
